nodes.id:
ref:q
				.from({ ws: collections.workspaces })
				.where(({ ws }) => eq(ws.id, workspaceId))
				.select
nodes.name:
q
				.from({ ws: collections.workspaces })
				.where(({ ws }) => eq(ws.id, workspaceId))
				.select

edges.target:
ref:q
				.from({ ws: collections.workspaces })
				.where(({ ws }) => eq(ws.id, workspaceId))
				.select
